pyacs package

Subpackages and submodules (with links to description pages)

pyacs.glinalg

pyacs.gts

The gts subpackage contains the Gts class and the Sgts class.

pyacs.lib

pyacs.message

pyacs.sinex

pyacs.sol

The sol subpackage contains the Sol class.

pyacs.vel_field

Velocity field package: read, manipulate and write GMT psvelo velocity fields.

pyacs.debug

pyacs.verbose

Set pyacs verbose level and optionally configure file logging.
